summary_text: 1. In [test_scheduler_gate1.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L88), change the `_make_post` default slot from off-slot to fixed-slot: `scheduled_for: str = "2026-03-28 10:00"` → `scheduled_for: str = "2026-03-28 11:50"`. 2. In [test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L170), change the quote preflight fixture to a fixed slot: `scheduled_for="2026-03-29 12:00"` → `scheduled_for="2026-03-29 11:50"`. 3. In [test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L213), align the scheduler-flow `now` fixture to a fixed slot so `_quarantine_invalid_approved_posts` does not fail it first: `now = datetime(2026, 3, 29, 12, 0)` → `now = datetime(2026, 3, 29, 11, 50)`. 4. In [test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L244), make the same fixed-slot alignment for the second flow test: `now = datetime(2026, 3, 29, 12, 0)` → `now = datetime(2026, 3, 29, 11, 50)`. 5. Optional fixture hardening (same file): define one constant near the top and use it in all three places above to avoid future off-slot drift, e.g. at [test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L56): `FIXED_TEST_SLOT = "2026-03-29 11:50"` and derive `now` from it.
